"candidate": "# Industrial Data Platform Project Summary

## 1. Project Overview
**Purpose:**
This project aims to build a scalable
column3: and high-performance data platform to centralize industrial IoT
column5: and operational data for real-time analytics
column7:
and business intelligence.

**Scope:**
- Data ingestion from machines
column9: and legacy systems.\n- Storage and processing using cloud/on-premise hybrid architecture.\n- Integration with BI tools (e.g.
column11: Power BI) and ML pipelines.\n- Compliance with GDPR
column13:
and industry-specific regulations.

**Objectives:**
1. Reduce data silos by 70% within 12 months.
2. Enable real-time decision-making with sub-second latency.
3. Improve operational efficiency by 20% via predictive analytics.

---

column19: AWS Glue              |\n| Analytics               | SQL-based querying and ML model serving.                                   | Databricks
column23: AWS IAM             |\n| Monitoring              | End-to-end observability for performance and anomalies.                      | Prometheus
